title: Syndicated Loans, Indonesia Market - Global Investment Banking
description:
Who We Are:

As Singapore’s longest established bank, we have been dedicated to enabling individuals and businesses to achieve their aspirations since 1932. How? By taking the time to truly understand people. From there, we provide support, services, solutions, and career paths that meet their individual needs and desires.

Today, we’re on a journey of transformation. Leveraging technology and creativity to become a future-ready learning organisation. But for all that change, our strategic ambition is consistently clear and bold, which is to be Asia’s leading financial services partner for a sustainable future.

We invite you to build the bank of the future. Innovate the way we deliver financial services. Work in friendly, supportive teams. Build lasting value in your community. Help people grow their assets, business, and investments. Take your learning as far as you can. Or simply enjoy a vibrant, future-ready career.

Your Opportunity Starts Here.


Why Join

Play a key role in shaping the loan origination and syndication strategy for one of Asia's leading banks. As an Executive Director in our Global Investment Banking Division, you'll have the opportunity to work on complex, high-profile transactions, develop deep relationships with clients, and contribute to the growth of our loan business.

How you succeed

To excel in this role, you'll need to combine strong technical skills with commercial acumen and a deep understanding of the loan market. You'll work closely with our origination, syndication, and distribution teams to identify opportunities, structure transactions, and execute trades. Your ability to analyze complex financial data, think critically, and communicate effectively will be essential in driving success in this role.


Position Overview:

The candidate will be a pivotal member of the Loans Origination (Indonesia) team within Loan Capital Markets, with a primary focus on independently originating and executing syndicated loan transactions specifically within the Indonesian market. Deep expertise and a strong network in Indonesia’s syndication and capital markets are essential.


What you do

  • Proactively originate and structure syndicated loan deals tailored to the unique dynamics and regulatory environment of the Indonesian market.
  • Utilize an extensive and well-established network within Indonesia’s syndication markets to identify and secure high-quality lending opportunities.
  • Conduct in-depth analysis of Indonesian clients’ financing needs, encompassing transaction due diligence, debt capacity, and market liquidity, while staying abreast of local pricing trends and market developments.
  • Provide strategic recommendations on financing solutions that align with Indonesia’s economic conditions, regulatory framework, and market practices.
  • Prepare comprehensive financing proposals, credit memoranda, term sheets, cash flow models, information memoranda, and investor presentations, leveraging local market insights and collaborating closely with junior team members.
  • Lead the end-to-end execution process for Indonesian deals, including syndication launch preparation, documentation review, investor engagement, and deal closing, ensuring compliance with local regulations and market standards.
  • Collaborate effectively with internal teams and external partners to facilitate smooth transaction execution from mandate through closing, with a focus on the Indonesian market landscape.
  • Partner with the distribution team to develop underwriting, pricing, liquidity, and syndication strategies that reflect the nuances of Indonesia’s capital markets.
  • Mentor and guide junior team members, sharing deep knowledge of the Indonesian market to build team capability.

Who you work with

Global Investment Banking gives you the way into Capital Markets, Corporate Finance, and the Mezzanine Capital Unit. The team offer wide-ranging funding solutions, across key markets, ensuring local customers benefit from international expertise. In return, the chance to build deep experience, across the entire project lifecycle, exposure to multiple industries, and an international career.

Who you are

  • Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Accounting, Economics, or a related discipline.
  • Minimum of 15 years’ relevant experience in corporate banking, investment banking, and/or loan syndication, with a strong track record specifically in the Indonesian market.
  • Demonstrated expertise in credit analysis, loan structuring, loan syndication, and capital markets within Indonesia.
  • Strong analytical skills with meticulous attention to detail.
  • Excellent interpersonal and communication skills, with the ability to build and maintain relationships in Indonesia’s financial sector.
  • Proven ability to manage multiple priorities and work effectively in a fast-paced environment.
  • Client-oriented mindset with a passion for delivering innovative financing solutions tailored to Indonesian clients.
  • Proficiency in Bahasa Indonesia is highly desirable.

What we offer:

Competitive base salary. A suite of holistic, flexible benefits to suit every lifestyle. Community initiatives. Industry-leading learning and professional development opportunities. Your wellbeing, growth and aspirations are every bit as cared for as the needs of our customers.

postedCompany.description:
The longest-established Singapore bank, we’ve been helping people and businesses get what they want from life since 1932. How? By taking the time to truly understand their needs. And it starts with looking after our people. With a motivated, purpose-driven culture. Looking after your well-being. Providing continuous holistic growth. 


Today, we are on a journey of transformation. Pioneering banking solutions with a future-ready mindset. Unleashing the creativity and ambition of our people though the largest-of-its-kind open-learning program. Harnessing the power of seamless data and technology to create first-to-market products and services. Partnering with sustainability innovators. Financing green technologies. Working in close-knit collaborative teams. Where you feel included and in complete control of your career growth. Now and into the future. 


We are recognised as one of the World's Top 50 Safest Banks by Global Finance. And the best-managed bank in Singapore and Asia Pacific by The Asian Banker. From this foundation of financial strength and robust technology, we serve 3.5 million people across Asia. Our footprint covers over 1,000 branches throughout Singapore, Malaysia, Indonesia, China, Hong Kong and Macao.  


Now it's time to launch your career at the forefront of banking. Whether you want to innovate needs-based financial services. Find the best version of yourself in a friendly, supportive team. Build lasting value in your community. Help people grow their assets, business, and investments. Take your learning as far as you can. Or simply enjoy a vibrant, future-ready career, your Opportunity Starts Here.
postedCompany.name: OVERSEA-CHINESE BANKING CORPORATION LIMITED

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
